iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 00:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Supreme Leader wounded/disfigured status per Hegseth. $10M reward for Khamenei info. No weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test detected. Iran casualties now 1,444 killed / 18,551 injured. US deploying 10K interceptor drones. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 02:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. (1) Trump says 'many countries' sending warships to Hormuz — naval coalition forming. (2) Fire continues at Fujairah oil hub (UAE). (3) Tehran urges ME countries to expel US military. (4) Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks — unusual split. (5) FCC threatens news outlets over Iran war coverage. No signal changes. 100 (stable, capped).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 02:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. (1) BBC visits Israeli strike aftermath in Lebanon — family killed, relatives say civilians not Hezbollah. IDF says targeting 'terrorist infrastructure.' (2) IRGC-coordinated missile/drone launch with Hezbollah for al-Quds Day continues. No new signal triggers. 92 (stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Turkey continuing mediation in Pak-Afghanistan alongside China. No new intercept events. Mediation role slightly de-escalatory for Turkey's own profile but regional instability keeps pressure high. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India remains diplomatically engaged. Two Indian ships granted Hormuz passage. Energy security concern remains. No military escalation signals on border. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil. US easing sanctions on Russian oil. Kremlin expects strategic benefits from Iran war. No direct ME intervention. Russia continuing Ukraine strikes while US distracted. 42 + 8 (Iran coupling) = 50.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China actively mediating Pak-Afghanistan — Wang Yi-Muttaqi call, special envoy shuttling. China reducing fossil fuel consumption faster via electrification. No new escalation signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles now confirmed by 7+ sources (Reuters, Guardian, Japan Times, Chosun, EADaily, Bloomberg, Zee News). Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. Kim Jong-un previously observed cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon (Mar 4). No ICBM or nuclear test. Signal was already captured — no change needed. 47 (stable, was rising but barrage now well-established).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. UPDATE: (1) Death toll in Kyiv strikes now 6 killed, 15 wounded (Reuters updated from 4). (2) Zelenskyy warns 'Russia will exploit war in Middle East to cause greater destruction in Europe.' (3) Ukraine intercepted 460 Russian aerial targets overnight. (4) Russian strikes hit Ukrzaliznytsia (railway) facilities, injuring staff. (5) Ukrainian drone attacks hitting Russia's Black Sea oil export facilities, slowing exports. 56 + 8 (Kyiv death toll rise + Zelenskyy warning + railway targeting) + 5 (coupling) = 67.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 16 02:04. (1) Pakistan shoots down Afghan 'rudimentary drones' (DW). (2) Zardari: Taliban attacks on civilians 'crossed a red line' (LA Times). (3) Pakistan strikes Kandahar base after president's warning. (4) Pakistan between two fronts: Afghanistan war + Iran war affecting Saudi alliance (Indian Express). (5) China/Turkey mediation failing. Cycle continues: Afghan drones Islamabad → PAF strikes Kandahar → Pakistani airstrikes Kabul → Afghan Durand Line ops. No ceasefire. 98 (stable — no new major escalation beyond existing signals).

AFGHANISTAN CLAIMS 14 PAKISTANI SOLDIERS KILLED — Durand Line operations in Kunar/Nangarhar, armored tank destroyed (ANI/Tribune)
PAF HITS HAJJ FUEL DEPOTS AT KANDAHAR AIRPORT — Civilian/UN flight supplies affected (Tolo News)
IRAN THREATENS US-LINKED ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE — Any American-linked oil/gas facilities targeted (CNN/AJ)
PENTAGON VOWS TO RAMP UP MILITARY CAMPAIGN — 'Operation Epic Fury' intensifies (AJ liveblog)
US DEPLOYING 10,000 INTERCEPTOR DRONES TO MIDDLE EAST — Counter Iranian drone threat (AJ/Army)
RUSSIA STRIKES KYIV — Death toll now 6 killed, 15 wounded. 460 targets intercepted. Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME war (Reuters/NPR)
DPRK FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES — Third provocation this week during US-SK drills, confirmed by 7+ sources (Reuters/Guardian/Japan Times)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION CONTINUES — MULTIPLE FRONTS ACTIVE: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN 98 IMMINENT RISING — New: Pakistan strikes Kabul, 6 civilians killed. Both sides now striking each other's capitals. China/Turkey mediation failing. 'RejectOppression' campaign. (2) IRAN 100 IMMINENT RISING — 1,444 killed/18,551 injured. US deploying 10K drones. Hegseth says Supreme Leader 'wounded and disfigured.' $10M bounty. F1 cancelled. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE 67 CRITICAL RISING — Death toll 6 in Kyiv strikes. Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME distraction. US peace talks frozen. (4) DPRK 47 CRITICAL — 10+ missiles confirmed by 7+ sources. Third provocation in one week. GLOBAL: 77% IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT (Iran conv 100, Pak-Afghan 98, Israel-Leb 92, Turkey 71, RU-Ukr 72 with coupling). CRITICAL: Russia 50, DPRK 47. WATCH: Pak-Afghanistan mutual capital strikes = open war. Iran escalation spiral. Russia free to escalate Ukraine while US distracted.

latest_news.headline: US-Israel strike Isfahan province — 15+ killed. Trump urges allies to keep Hormuz open
latest_news.text: US and Israel continue strikes on Iran, missiles hitting multiple sites in Isfahan province — at least 15 killed. Trump says allies relying on Gulf oil must help keep Strait of Hormuz open.

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan claims 14 Pakistani soldiers killed in Durand Line operations
latest_news.text: Afghan MoD claims operations in Kunar/Nangarhar killed 14 Pakistani soldiers, injured 11. Armored tank destroyed. 'RejectOppression' campaign.

latest_news.headline: PAF strikes hit Hajj fuel depots at Kandahar Airport
latest_news.text: PAF strikes hit fuel reserves at Kandahar Airport. Fuel was for Hajj flights — civilian and UN flights affected.

latest_news.headline: China urges Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire — Wang Yi calls Muttaqi, envoy shuttling
latest_news.text: Chinese FM Wang Yi urged Afghan counterpart Muttaqi for dialogue, not force. Special envoy shuttling between countries. No ceasefire achieved.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens to strike US-linked energy infrastructure across region
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi vowed retaliation for Kharg strike — armed forces will strike any US-linked energy infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: US deploying 10,000 interceptor drones to Middle East
latest_news.text: US deploying 10K interceptor drones to counter ongoing Iranian drone attacks. Major military buildup continues.

latest_news.headline: Russia strikes Kyiv — death toll now 6 killed, 15 wounded. Zelenskyy warns of ME exploitation.
latest_news.text: Combined missile/drone attack on Kyiv region. Death toll updated to 6 killed. 460 Russian aerial targets intercepted. Zelenskyy warns Russia will exploit ME conflict for greater destruction in Europe.

latest_news.headline: DPRK fires 10+ ballistic missiles — confirmed by 7+ sources during US-SK drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles into East Sea during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' exercises. Third provocation this week. Kim Jong-un previously observed cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 77% IMMINENT (Day 16 02:04). SITUATION STABLE — NO MAJOR ESCALATION THIS HOUR. All fronts continuing at prior levels: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN 98 IMMINENT RISING — Zardari says Taliban 'crossed a red line.' Pakistan shoots down Afghan drones. Strikes continue on both sides. Pakistan facing two-front nightmare (Afghanistan + Iran war). China/Turkey mediation failing. (2) IRAN 100 IMMINENT STABLE — Trump says 'many countries' sending warships to Hormuz. Fire continues at Fujairah. Tehran urges ME to expel US military. Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks (unusual split). FCC threatens media outlets. (3) ISRAEL-LEBANON 92 IMMINENT STABLE — BBC visits strike aftermath (family killed). IDF continues targeting 'terrorist infrastructure.' (4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE 67/72 CRITICAL RISING — Death toll 6 in Kyiv strikes. Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME distraction. (5) DPRK 47 CRITICAL — 10+ missiles confirmed. (6) TURKEY 71 IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT. TWO CRITICAL. NO NEW CONFLICT ZONES DETECTED. WATCH: Overnight/early morning in Asia-Pacific — watch for DPRK provocations during quiet hours. Fujairah fire status. Hormuz naval coalition development.
